title: 50 Years of East Leake FC
text: 2025 marks our golden anniversary. Celebrations are planned throughout the year — stay tuned for details on our 50th Anniversary Dinner and special commemorative kit.

title: Pre-Season Training Returns
text: Pre-season training kicks off in July. All registered and new players welcome. Sessions held Tuesday and Thursday evenings at the East Leake Pavilion, Costock Road.

title: Sponsorship Opportunities
text: Want to support local football? We're looking for kit sponsors, matchday sponsors, and programme advertisers for the 2025–26 season. Get in touch to find out more.

title: New Players Welcome
text: Thinking about getting back into football? Whether it's senior, youth, girls or ladies — East Leake FC welcomes players of all abilities. Come along to a training session.
